scene1_hook: {'narration': "You wake up in the dead of night with a chill that won't go away", 'keywords_scene1': ['cold feet at night', 'foot pain relief', 'cold toes']}
scene2_problem: {'narration': "For millions, cold feet are more than just a nuisance. They're a debilitating condition that ruins daily life.", 'keywords_scene2': ['cold feet symptoms', 'foot discomfort', 'winter foot pain']}
scene3_stakes: {'narration': "Imagine not being able to walk your daughter down the aisle, or play with your grandkids. That's what millions face every day", 'keywords_scene3': ['cold feet and relationships', 'foot pain in elderly', 'winter foot health']}
scene4_solution: {'narration': 'The Cold Feet Society provides vital research and treatment options, giving hope to those suffering', 'keywords_scene4': ['cold feet treatment', 'foot pain relief methods', 'cold toe remedies']}
scene5_ask: {'narration': 'Will you help us bring warmth back to the lives of millions? Donate $25 today at dmpgh.com.', 'keywords_scene5': ['donate cold feet society', 'cold feet charity', 'foot pain donation']}

lines: Helping those affected by cold feet worldwide
